title: Kensuke's Kingdom
plot: Young Michael, shipwrecked on a remote island, must adapt to life alone. Over time, he feels another presence, learning that this world is home to both unimaginable danger and beauty.
actors: Cillian Murphy, Raffey Cassidy, Sally Hawkins

categories.label: Japanese lives scattered after defeat
categories.description: In the years after 1945, some Japanese people remain marked by displacement, separation, and the collapse of the empire that once stretched across the Pacific. What you'll see: solitary habits, improvised living in remote places, silence around the past, and a guarded relation to the wider world.

categories.label: thick island wilderness beyond settlements
categories.description: Even where people have passed through, many islands remain dominated by dense vegetation, cliffs, reefs, and animal life rather than roads or built order. What you'll see: tangled forest paths, hidden coves, steep shorelines, bright birds and sea creatures, and terrain that feels both beautiful and perilous.
